Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: Star Eydie Gorme shares a hospital room. Also, Tim plays a man whose houseplant hates him, and The Oldest Man.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns as Carol's guest, highlighted by a dual role in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Dionne Warwick

Video.summary: Alan Alda stars! This episode features Alda as a department store Santa, and as Eunice's brother Larry.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan Alda

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his eleventh and final season premiere guest star spot!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: George Gobel joins Carol in a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess living in squalor in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, George Gobel

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: Paul Sand and Eydie Gorme guest star in a salute to movie series such as "Dr. Kildaire".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Guest James Coco takes a slow boat to romance in the Saturday Night Tearjerker movie spoof, "One Way Ticket."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: James Coco, Pointer Sister

Video.summary: A meeting between incoming and outgoing First Ladies, an awkward audition, and the movie spoof "Kids Town."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars as a husband who is visited by the water department. Mrs. Wiggins and Mr. Tudball celebrate.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: "The Family" steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a fancy restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Pat Paulsen star. Pat looks at "How To Be A Sensuous Female" and Cass joins 10th Avenue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Cass Elliot, Pat Paulsen

Video.summary: Paul Lynde plays a smarmy insurance salesman, and later appears on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guests Mickey Rooney and John Davidson join Carol and Vicki to tell the tale of "The Four Funns Of Broadway."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray join the gang for a series of Carol's patented commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: John Byner and Petula Clark head downtown to the show.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson arrives for the Q&A...but she only has eyes for Lyle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Poetically-named guest stars Martha Raye and Tim Conway come to play.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Harvey Korman leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marily Horne
